title: SaiOptimized
description: All your Performance needs in one simple pack with Shaders,
body:
### A Opimizations & Enhancements pack for your Vanilla Playthroughs

With all the Optimization mods and Animations you will ever need.

Featuring:
- Distant Horizons
- Simple Voice chat
- Shader Support
- BetterF3
- Axiom
- Chest Tracker
  
If you have any wishes for mods being added just dm me on Discord!

Huge Thanks to [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) for inspiration and a good Starter base!
